summary: Simplify timesheet approval chains to match configured templates and remove historical repair comments from live approval progress.

notes: Clears exact system repair comments equal to 'V0.15 premature summary repair' from approval nodes and assignees.
Does not remove business approval opinions or approval records.
Approval chain cards now show only template node, node status, approver names, and optional project-block context.
Action, opinion, timestamp, and historical-route log details are no longer shown in the approval progress chain.
The chain count is based on the current configured template plus the submit node.

verification: After deploy, run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.4.
After deploy, run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/.
known_warnings: ESLint still reports existing warnings in dashboard/ui/TimesheetPage files, but exits 0.
Vite still warns that the main index chunk is larger than 500 kB.
